package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "google.golang.org/grpc"
    "google.golang.org/grpc/metadata"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for grpc_unary_interceptor_per_rpc: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Define interceptors once at server initialization, not per-RPC
func loggingInterceptor(ctx context.Context, req interface{}, info *grpc.UnaryServerInfo, handler grpc.UnaryHandler) (interface{}, error) {
    start := time.Now()
    resp, err := handler(ctx, req)
    _ = time.Since(start)
    return resp, err
}

var grpcServer = grpc.NewServer(
    grpc.UnaryInterceptor(loggingInterceptor),
)

type GreeterServer struct {
    UnimplementedGreeterServer
}

func (s *GreeterServer) SayHello(ctx context.Context, req *HelloRequest) (*HelloReply, error) {
    return &HelloReply{Message: "hello"}, nil
}
